mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_seckill_coupon WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM user_seckill_coupon WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM user_seckill_coupon WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0 AND effective_time <= NOW() AND expire_time > NOW() ORDER BY expire_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_seckill_coupon (activity_id, user_id, status, effective_time, expire_time) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{effectiveTime}, #{expireTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_seckill_coupon SET status = 1, used_product_id = #{productId}, used_exchange_record_id = #{exchangeRecordId}, used_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
UPDATE user_seckill_coupon SET status = 2 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
